title: Prediction-safe one-shot SWEP effect
prompt:
Implement SWEP:PrimaryAttack for a weapon that plays a one-off cosmetic effect when fired. Because the function runs under client prediction, it can execute several times for a single shot. Schedule the next allowed shot correctly under prediction, but make sure the cosmetic effect is emitted only once per real shot rather than on every predicted re-run. Do not gate the whole attack behind the once-only check.

Return exactly one fenced lua code block, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.

oracle.expectedPrimitive: predicted state outside and one-shot effect inside IsFirstTimePredicted
